candidates.name: jax
candidates.rationale: JAX 0.10.0 CUDA13 wheel passed hello-GPU; see artifacts/m2/scout/hello_gpu/jax/output.txt
candidates.install_command: python -m venv data/scratch/m2-scout-venv && source data/scratch/m2-scout-venv/bin/activate && pip install 'jax[cuda13]==0.10.0'
known_gaps: Only functional smoke-tested; no profiler artifact in this scout.
Requires CUDA 13 wheels and driver new enough for CUDA 13 runtime.

candidates.name: triton
known_gaps: Triton driver activation depends on torch.cuda in the current wheel.
Only pointwise JIT launch tested; no stencil/column kernel evidence yet.

candidates.name: gt4py
known_gaps: PyPI GT4Py 1.1.9 installs, but the DaCe 0.10.0 dependency is not Python 3.13 clean here.
Published GT4Py quick-start GPU extras still document cuda11x-style extras, not a CUDA 13 Blackwell path.

candidates.name: kokkos
candidates.rationale: Kokkos 4.7.1 BLACKWELL120 source build passed; see hello_gpu/kokkos/output.txt
candidates.install_command: source env_wrf_gpu.sh && cmake -S data/scratch/m2-scout-src/kokkos -B data/scratch/m2-scout-build/kokkos -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=$PWD/data/scratch/m2-scout-install/kokkos -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=$PWD/data/scratch/m2-scout-src/kokkos/bin/nvcc_wrapper -DKokkos_ENABLE_CUDA=ON -DKokkos_ARCH_BLACKWELL120=ON -DKokkos_ENABLE_SERIAL=ON && cmake --build data/scratch/m2-scout-build/kokkos --parallel 8 && cmake --install data/scratch/m2-scout-build/kokkos
known_gaps: Requires user-local Kokkos source build; no preinstalled package was found.
Compile path is heavier than Python candidates.

candidates.name: cupy_or_numba
candidates.rationale: CuPy 14.0.1 CUDA13x wheel passed hello-GPU; see hello_gpu/cupy_or_numba/output.txt
known_gaps: CuPy was selected over Numba for this candidate because CUDA 13x wheels are direct and clean.
Only array expression smoke-tested; raw-kernel ergonomics still need M2 implementation evidence.

candidates.name: cuda_tile
candidates.rationale: CUDA 13.1 nvcc -arch=sm_120 passed hello-GPU; see hello_gpu/cuda_tile/output.txt
known_gaps: No profiler or transfer audit in this functional scout.
